name: Cloudian - Poison Cloud
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>雲魔物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>クラウディアン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ポイズン・クラウド
desc: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, if it was face-up at the start of the Damage Step: Destroy the monster that destroyed it, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, if it was face-up at the start of the Damage Step: Destroy the monster that destroyed it, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent.
eff: When this card is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, if it was face-up at the start of the Damage Step: Destroy the monster that destroyed it, and if you do, inflict 800 damage to your opponent.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
